context: Tests whether the agent implements customer LTV, segmentation tiers, activity status logic, and daily KPI calculations following the prescribed thresholds and formulas, plus a customer identity resolution table.

checklist.name: Customer tier: one_time
checklist.description: Customer tier classification assigns 'one_time' to customers with exactly 1 total order

checklist.name: Customer tier: repeat thresholds
checklist.description: Customer tier assigns 'repeat' for 2-3 orders and 'loyal' for 4-10 orders (both thresholds must be correct)

checklist.name: Customer tier: champion
checklist.description: Customer tier assigns 'champion' for customers with more than 10 orders

checklist.name: Activity status: churned threshold
checklist.description: Activity status assigns 'churned' when days since last order exceeds 365

checklist.name: Activity status: at_risk and cooling
checklist.description: Activity status assigns 'at_risk' for >180 days and 'cooling' for >90 days since last order (both thresholds and labels must match)

checklist.name: LTV 24-month formula
checklist.description: Predicted LTV uses the formula: (total_revenue / (customer_lifespan_days / 30.0)) * 24, cast to numeric

checklist.name: LTV fallback for new customers
checklist.description: The LTV calculation falls back to total_revenue for customers with lifespan of 30 days or fewer

checklist.name: KPI: gross_margin_pct formula
checklist.description: kpi_daily_summary calculates gross_margin_pct as (gross_profit / net_revenue * 100), guarded against division by zero

checklist.name: KPI: avg_order_value formula
checklist.description: kpi_daily_summary calculates avg_order_value as (net_revenue / total_orders), guarded against division by zero

checklist.name: KPI: returning_customer_pct
checklist.description: kpi_daily_summary calculates a returning customer percentage metric (returning_customers / unique_customers * 100 or equivalent)

checklist.name: Cohort month field
checklist.description: The LTV model includes a cohort_month field derived from the customer's first order date truncated to month

checklist.name: Customer identity mapping table
checklist.description: dim_customer_identity.sql defines a table or model that maps multiple identifiers (at minimum: email and at least one platform-specific ID) to a single canonical customer key
